title: Portfolio Optimizer with Monte Carlo & Black-Scholes
description: Markowitz efficient frontier, 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations, and Black-Scholes options pricing across 10 assets.

title: Credit Risk Engine with XGBoost & SHAP
description: End-to-end credit default predictor with SHAP explainability and three-tier risk scoring on real lending data.

title: ILS Glide Path & ICAO Geometry
description: ILS approach simulation from ICAO Annex 10 standards with CDI deviation display and CAT I decision height assessment.

title: Great Circle Routing & Fuel Optimization
description: Haversine and Vincenty routing with wind-corrected fuel burn and ETOPS compliance checking for major international routes.

title: RAG Financial Document Analyst
description: FAISS vector search RAG system on 2025 earnings data with source citations and semantic retrieval.

title: Agentic SQL Analyst with Natural Language Interface
description: AI agent translating plain English to verified SQL over a DuckDB database with 15,000+ rows across flights and transactions.

title: Real-Time Fraud Detection Pipeline
description: SMOTE resampling, Isolation Forest, and Random Forest with streaming simulation and configurable alert thresholds.

title: Flight Delay Prediction with Causal ML
description: DoWhy causal DAG isolating true effect of weather, NAS congestion, and carrier issues on flight delay probability.

title: Recommendation Engine with Implicit Feedback
description: ALS matrix factorization recommender with implicit feedback, NDCG@10 evaluation, and popularity bias analysis.

title: LLM Evaluation & Hallucination Benchmark
description: Real LLM comparison on 20 expert-verified finance and aviation QA pairs scored with ROUGE and BERTScore.

title: Mechanistic Interpretability of GPT-2 Medium
description: Activation patching on the IOI circuit of GPT-2 Medium. Layers 0-2 show 100% recovery. Paris predicted correctly at logit 20.47.

title: RLHF Pipeline from Scratch
description: DistilBERT reward model trained on 12 human preference pairs with PPO KL-penalized reward shaping.

title: Multi-Agent Conversations with GPT-4o-mini
description: Two and three-agent simulations with role-based system prompts, shared conversation history, and fallback model handling.

title: GBM Simulation — SanDisk vs ASML
description: Full GBM derivation from Itô's Lemma with 500 Monte Carlo paths, Black-Scholes options pricing, and Greeks.

title: RAG with Chunking + Local Ollama LLM
description: LangChain + ChromaDB RAG pipeline with RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter and local Ollama inference — cloud and offline approaches.

title: LangGraph Email Triage Agent
description: Stateful LangGraph agent with triage router, ReAct response agent, and tool calling for email, calendar, and meeting scheduling.

title: AI Health & Fitness Assistant
description: Multi-provider AI assistant combining Watsonx Llama vision for gym equipment detection and workout planning with an agentic food analyzer via Gradio.

title: Love at First Agent — LangGraph + XGBoost
description: LangGraph ReAct agent that autonomously profiles speed dating data, guards against leakage, selects features via RFE, and predicts match probability. ROC AUC 0.8553.

title: Weather Data API App
description: Weather data application using live API integration for real-time forecasts, historical analysis, and interactive visualization.

title: BlackJack to Five — Probability & Optimal Strategy
description: Monte Carlo simulation of 10,000 BlackJack-to-Five games with bust probability analysis and dynamic programming optimal strategy.

title: Grocery Bagger — Bin Packing Optimization
description: Bin packing optimization comparing First Fit, First Fit Decreasing, and Fragile-First algorithms. Python data science layer on top of a Java group project.

title: DS & AI Interview Prep Agent
description: AI-powered interview prep system that analyzes job descriptions against your resume, identifies skill gaps, and scores answers in real time using GPT-4o-mini across 49 questions in 9 domains.

title: Type 2 Diabetes Risk Predictor
description: XGBoost diabetes risk prediction with clinical feature engineering, zero-value imputation, and Low/Moderate/High risk tiering with lifestyle intervention recommendations. ROC-AUC 0.8220.

title: Parkinson's Tremor Detector — Voice Analysis
description: Detects Parkinson's disease from voice recordings using MDVP jitter, shimmer, HNR, RPDE, and DFA biomarkers. XGBoost and SVM achieve ROC-AUC 0.9828 with 96.6% clinical sensitivity.

title: Anxiety & Isolation Sentiment Tracker
description: Zero-shot NLP classifier detecting anxiety, isolation, depression, and neutral mental states using BART-large-MNLI. Simulates a 30-day longitudinal mental health tracking journey with weekly state rollup.

title: PilotGPT v2 — IFR Full Suite
description: Complete IFR flight planning system built by an IFR-rated pilot. LangGraph ReAct agent with 5 tools covering holding pattern entries, E6B wind correction, density altitude, and full IFR flight plan generation — all math from FAA standards.

title: Recipe Maker with Gemma 4 Vision + DALL-E 3
description: Multi-model AI pipeline: Gemma 4 (local) detects food ingredients from photos, GPT-4o-mini generates complete recipes with nutrition, and DALL-E 3 produces professional restaurant-quality food photos for each dish. Full end-to-end system with error handling and user-friendly interface.

title: PilotGPT v3 — VFR & IFR Flight Assistant
description: Expanded PilotGPT with VFR capabilities including sectional chart parsing, VFR weather briefing, airspace classification, and TFR lookup. ReAct agent with 7 tools for comprehensive VFR and IFR flight assistance.
